searchBanner.heading: Frequently Asked Questions About Giddh
searchBanner.subHeading: Everything you need to know about cloud accounting, features, pricing, and security.

questions.question: What is Giddh?
questions.answer: Giddh is a comprehensive cloud-based accounting software designed for businesses of all sizes. It simplifies financial management by automating calculations, invoice generation, inventory management, and financial reporting.

questions.question: Who is Giddh suitable for?
questions.answer: Giddh is suitable for startups, small and medium businesses, freelancers, and chartered accountants who need a simple yet powerful accounting solution.

questions.question: Is Giddh suitable for small businesses?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh is specifically designed with small businesses in mind, offering an intuitive interface and affordable pricing plans.

questions.question: Can CAs use Giddh for multiple clients?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh offers multi-company management features that allow CAs to manage multiple client accounts from a single dashboard.

questions.question: Is Giddh cloud-based?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh is fully cloud-based. You can access your accounting data anytime, anywhere from any device with an internet connection.

questions.question: How is Giddh different from Tally?
questions.answer: Unlike Tally, Giddh is cloud-based, requires no installation, and offers real-time collaboration and seamless bank integrations.

questions.question: Does Giddh support tax billing?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh fully supports tax billing with automatic tax calculations and compliant invoice generation.

questions.question: Does Giddh support multi-company accounting?
questions.answer: Yes, you can manage multiple companies under a single Giddh account and switch between them effortlessly.

questions.question: Can I manage inventory in Giddh?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh offers built-in inventory management with stock tracking, warehouse management, and inventory valuation.

questions.question: Does Giddh support bank reconciliation?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh supports automatic bank reconciliation by connecting your bank accounts and matching transactions.

questions.question: Can I create purchase and sales invoices?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh allows you to create professional purchase and sales invoices with customizable templates.

questions.question: Does Giddh support recurring invoices?
questions.answer: Yes, you can set up recurring invoices in Giddh for regular billing cycles, saving time on repetitive tasks.

questions.question: Can I track expenses and income?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh provides comprehensive expense and income tracking with categorization and real-time reporting.

questions.question: Does Giddh provide financial reports like P&L and balance sheet?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh automatically generates Profit & Loss statements, Balance Sheets, Trial Balance, and other essential financial reports.

questions.question: Is Giddh tax compliant?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh is fully compliant with local tax regulations and supports all tax filing requirements.

questions.question: Can I export tax reports for filing?
questions.answer: Yes, you can export tax reports in the required formats for easy filing through your local tax portal.

questions.question: Does Giddh auto-calculate tax?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh automatically calculates applicable taxes based on the transaction type and location.

questions.question: Does Giddh support e-invoicing?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh supports e-invoicing as per government regulations, allowing you to generate compliant digital invoices.

questions.question: Is Giddh free?
questions.answer: Giddh offers a free trial to explore all features. After the trial, you can choose from affordable pricing plans.

questions.question: What plans does Giddh offer?
questions.answer: Giddh offers flexible plans tailored for freelancers, small businesses, and enterprises. Visit our pricing page for details.

questions.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade anytime?
questions.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time based on your business needs.

questions.question: Is there a free trial?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh offers a free trial so you can explore all features before committing to a paid plan.

questions.question: Are there hidden charges?
questions.answer: No, Giddh has transparent pricing with no hidden charges. You only pay for the plan you choose.

questions.question: Do I need to pay annually?
questions.answer: Giddh offers both monthly and annual billing options. Annual plans come with additional savings.

questions.question: How secure is Giddh?
questions.answer: Giddh uses industry-standard encryption, secure cloud infrastructure, and regular security audits to protect your data.

questions.question: Is my data safe on Giddh?
questions.answer: Absolutely. Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit, with strict access controls and compliance measures.

questions.question: Where is my data stored?
questions.answer: Your data is stored on secure, enterprise-grade cloud servers with redundancy and high availability.

questions.question: Does Giddh offer data backup?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh automatically backs up your data regularly, ensuring you never lose your financial records.

questions.question: Is data encrypted?
questions.answer: Yes, all data in Giddh is encrypted using AES-256 encryption both at rest and during transmission.

questions.question: What happens if I stop my subscription?
questions.answer: Your data remains safe and accessible for a grace period. You can export your data at any time before or after cancellation.

questions.question: Does Giddh integrate with payment gateways?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh integrates with popular payment gateways for seamless payment tracking and reconciliation.

questions.question: Can I connect my bank account?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh supports direct bank connections for automatic transaction imports and reconciliation.

questions.question: Does Giddh integrate with CRM tools?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh integrates with popular CRM tools to streamline your sales and accounting workflows.

questions.question: Is Giddh accessible on mobile?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh is fully responsive and accessible from any mobile browser.

questions.question: Does Giddh have a mobile app?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh offers mobile apps for both Android and iOS for on-the-go accounting.

questions.question: Can I migrate from Tally to Giddh?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh provides a seamless Tally-to-Giddh migration tool that imports your existing data quickly and accurately.

questions.question: Does Giddh provide onboarding support?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh offers dedicated onboarding support to help you get started smoothly.

questions.question: Is training provided?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh provides training resources including video tutorials, documentation, and live support.

questions.question: How long does implementation take?
questions.answer: Giddh is cloud-based, so there's no installation needed. You can start using it within minutes of signing up.

questions.question: Can I import Excel data?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh supports importing data from Excel and CSV files for quick data migration.

cta.heading: Simplify Your Accounting with Giddh
cta.subheading: Join thousands of businesses managing invoicing and finances effortlessly.

questions.question: How can I contact Giddh support?
questions.answer: You can reach Giddh support via email, live chat, or phone. Visit our contact page for details.

questions.question: What are support hours?
questions.answer: Giddh support is available during business hours on weekdays, with email support available around the clock.

questions.question: Do you offer live chat?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh offers live chat support for quick assistance during business hours.

questions.question: Do you provide dedicated account managers?
questions.answer: Yes, enterprise plan customers get a dedicated account manager for personalized support.

questions.question: Is documentation available?
questions.answer: Yes, Giddh provides comprehensive documentation, FAQs, and video guides to help you use the platform effectively.
